name: Automatic Refund or Abatement of Disallowed Deficiencies

eligibility.description: Applies when a Tax Court deficiency is overturned or reduced by a court of review and the amount was not stayed by a bond.

description: If a taxpayer pays a deficiency (or does not stay collection) and the appeals court later disallows the deficiency, the IRS must automatically credit, refund, or abate the amount without the taxpayer filing a formal claim.
